title: cerastium alpinum subsp. aquaticum
intro: Cerastium alpinum subsp. aquaticum, also known as Alpine Cress or Water Mouse-ear, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Cerastium alpinum subsp. aquaticum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or externally to promote overall well-being and health.
